sets.name: designated_warehouses
sets.source: forced_open_warehouses intersected with warehouse rows filtered by Active Y/N in {Y, F}

sets.name: plant_warehouse_arcs
sets.description: designated warehouse에 대해서만 남는 plant -> warehouse 아크 집합
sets.source: plantWarehouseCost filtered by Warehouse ID in W_fix

sets.name: warehouse_customer_arcs
sets.description: designated warehouse에 대해서만 남는 warehouse -> customer 아크 집합
sets.source: warehouseCustomerCost filtered by Warehouse ID in W_fix

parameters.name: warehouse_operation_cost
parameters.description: 지정 warehouse 처리 물량 단위당 운영비

parameters.name: plant_warehouse_transport_cost
parameters.description: plant -> designated warehouse 물량 단위당 운송비

parameters.name: warehouse_customer_transport_cost
parameters.description: designated warehouse -> customer 수요 단위당 운송비

parameters.name: customer_mapping_id
parameters.description: 지정된 경우 customer를 특정 warehouse에만 배정하도록 강제하는 매핑

decision_variables.name: open_warehouse_fixed
decision_variables.description: 코드상 생성되지만 모든 지정 warehouse에 대해 1로 고정된다.

decision_variables.name: assign_customer
decision_variables.description: customer c를 지정 warehouse w에 배정하면 1; 정의역은 A_wc_fix

decision_variables.name: plant_to_warehouse_flow
decision_variables.description: plant p에서 지정 warehouse w로 보내는 정수 물량; 정의역은 A_pw_fix, 상한은 plant Product Qty

constraints.expression_summary: for each c in C: sum_{w:(w,c) in A_wc_fix} x[w,c] = 1
for each c with map[c]: x[map[c], c] = 1
for each w in W_fix: y[w] = 1
for each w in W_fix: sum_{c:(w,c) in A_wc_fix} x[w,c] >= 1
for each w in W_fix: sum_{c:(w,c) in A_wc_fix} d[c] * x[w,c] <= sum_{p:(p,w) in A_pw_fix} f[p,w]
for each w in W_fix: sum_{c:(w,c) in A_wc_fix} d[c] * x[w,c] <= cap[w]
for each p in P: sum_{w:(p,w) in A_pw_fix} f[p,w] <= s[p]

terms.name: designated_warehouse_customer_transport_cost_term
terms.expression_summary: sum_{(w,c) in A_wc_fix} d[c] * cwc[w,c] * x[w,c]

terms.name: designated_warehouse_operation_cost_term
terms.expression_summary: sum_{(w,c) in A_wc_fix} d[c] * oc[w] * x[w,c]

data_mapping.mapped_to: designated warehouse candidates filtered with values Y or F

notes: 이 모델은 best_model 해 주변의 1-swap warehouse 조합을 강제로 열어 두고 다시 최적 배정을 구하는 designated warehouse 재계산용 IR이다.
Customer demand is always fully assigned because each customer must choose exactly one eligible designated warehouse.
